title: Alexius Meinong
body: Alexius Meinong von Handschuchsheim (German: [ˈmaɪnɔŋ]; 17 July 1853 – 27 November 1920) was an Austrian philosopher, a realist known for his unique ontology and theory of objects. He also made contributions to philosophy of mind and theory of value.
categories: Academic staff of the University of Graz
People from the Kingdom of Galicia and Lodomeria
